title: Aave V4 has successfully passed the ARFC stage. Our team has been working hard to bring Aave V4 to mainnet.
message_html: Aave V4 has successfully passed the ARFC stage. Our team has been working hard to bring Aave V4 to mainnet. ...
snippet: Stani.eth (@StaniKulechov): Aave V4 has successfully passed the ARFC stage. Our team has been working hard to bring Aave V4 to mainnet. Next up: final AIP deployment and a safe, controlled, security-first launch.
